text: I was told by A friend that this mascara was her favorite. However I found it to be clumpy I ended up with drops of black on my face. I would not recommend this mascara.

When I tried to use the code I was informed it had already been used.
Not only that I was billed two times for the same product.
Now I wonder how I get out of paying for them.

Very Happy with Camera
For Indoor Use
In Color
Can watch from iPad or computer

I had this camera and upgraded it to a newer model. I use the newer camera as a security camera for my front yard. I like the app and that I can watch whats going on using my iPad. The camera is near the wireless router.
I used to used the older and newer camera in my barn a half an acre away from the wireless router. It did have connection issues. It was disconnecting. It was still good considering it was a half an acre away from the router.

Is it an OLED screen, yes. Does it fit on a PS Vita, yes. There are a number of issues with the details.

1) the housing does not support screwing in the bottom housing
2) the pegs for the thoulder buttons are too large. I had to shave them down and broke the ribbon cables nearby in the process.
3) the speakers are tinny as heck. It sounds ok, but not great.
4) Squeaks so bad. The housing is coming up and scrapped up so the select and start stay recessed.

I would not buy again.
I am glad I found this item as a fan of the original Michael Kors scent this is right up there. The color, the packaging and the fresh clean scent is very likeable. Needless to say I am a fan.

I have a heavy phone, Moto e4 plus and this device seemed to stay put with the strong suction cup... until it didn't. Definitely had to return this item because it could not do the one job it's supposed to.
Left weird bubble effect on the screen and you had to touch extra hard. Scribble did not work well, anymore. Threw it away.
This is an app. It works.

Deselen ScreenPlus 100 Inch HD Movie Projector Screen Rimless, Ambient Light Rejecting, Fabric Metal Particles, Clear. You can use both sides. I like the fact that you can hang it up on the sign or a backdrop or just pin it up by itself for an excellent screen for viewing. OZ
I ordered this for my friend and he got a blue case for the fat PS2 model not the slim.
It works - I do have to take my phone case off to fit it on to the actual charger, that part is not great

I've used 2 older/previous versions of Pinnacle, while clunky, I was comfortable with them. I don't like this new version, it's so flashy and I don't need all the features. There's still a learning curve even for me. Also, during DVD authoring, I'm not able to create a main title menu and a sub menu for chapter selection, what gives? It says this version is not possible. But the product specifications says it's able to create DVD menus with chapter pages.
Works for what I'm using it for, makeup. It's sometimes hard to pull the drawers out and back in, but for the price I'll deal with it.

Very useful little tool. I love the app. You can do video, images, PDFs....almost like a cam holder for youtuber (which I don't have and am not familiar with), and works for recording documents. This little thing made uploading my kids' homework so much easier instead of needing to refocus multiple times with my phone or scan papers one at a time. Love this useful tool.

I like it even though it is a little hard for me to twist it so that it adjust to desk or headboard. But the most interesting thing I found is that I not only use it at a desk with the clamp but I can comfortably wrap it around my knee/leg when I am not near a desk and use it. I have very sensitive finger tips due to health problems and this makes is so convenient.

I really like the scent. I wish it lasted longer but most soaps don't. It leaves my skin feeling smooth, it does exfoliate quite gently but the problem I run into is I have dry skin and this just doesn't offer enough moisturizing. If you have regular to oily skin and want a bodywash designed for men then you should definitely check out this product.
As expected, will be posting photos soon.
Sleek simple design that’s easy to put on and take off. After months of use there are still no signs of wear or damage. Everything still perfectly functional and looking sharp. Would buy again

Blue Sky used to be my go-to for calendars. The smaller sizing fits better in my bags. They don't make newer cover designs for the yearly planners anymore. You'll have to get a yearly/monthly, or weekly one for that. No special designs for us made by fancy artists, I have to trick it out myself. This one was also missing it's plastic pocket in the front, I had to use the one from last year's.
Screen protector cracked after about three months.
Fun game but it’s a little complex game play switching between ghost and regular and having to use both. It’s mostly in battles. Maybe I’m just too old haha

Light scent? Try almost NO scent. You may as well splash yourself with water. Considering that the picture on Amazon is close to actual size, that's far too little product for the cost, anyway. A waste of money.
I guess it's OK, my son played this for a while then went on to something else. Different gaming aspects then last editions, so it's not overly repetitive.
Just wish I could stop the game early and get the points for the words I got and not have to wait for the timer to run out. Otherwise it's a fun game, works great on my Incredible.
Good value. Durable and reasonable sould quality.
Thank you for this cute free app, my grand daughter and I like to play and it makes use our imagination our thinking caps!!!

I have been doing my best to get ahold of them, as the saw fit to autocharge and price gouge and, if you really, and I mean really, love jumoing through hoops, they may be your best bet.

Will not respond in chats, to emails, and to my completing their burdensome online support form--you know the type by which they narrow it down until no category left and stil no answer. Mcafee, I'll see you soon. I regret leaving you.
There is something wrong with the fulfillment of this item. I received the blue JD Fenix edition.
I felt like I was sliding down the front. Just could not stay on the seat.
Did not work for any mode.
Although these are much less expensive than the HP brand, I notice that they run out of ink faster than the HP brand but in the long run these are ok.

Not my favorite scents it is a very flowery scent with almost a mix of a smell that you might spray in a bathroom to make it smell better. It does last for most the day, but it just isn’t a smell I love. The presentation of it is great for a feminist as it hits to that with its “Queendom” and “Who Runs the World” in the box.

I have had the kindle app for yrs. Now can't download it from Amazon or play store. Can anyone tell me why? I've been reading a book but now can't find it.

EDIT:
Right after I wrote this review the app downloaded. Now a happy camper!!!!!

Phenomenal games in a very affordable and worthwhile package.
If I were to gripe about anything it's that the collectors edition package feels a bit on the cheap side.
The case holding the games isn't the most well crafted thing and i can feel both the case and the flimsy box holding it together deteriorating just a little bit at a time everytime I pull it off the shelf and take the game out.
So in a years time i feel it will look extremely battle damaged
I love this thing. I haven't used it yet, but I love looking at it on my desk. It's part of a project pile that will happily be done soon.

Noisy, jams easily, rather irritable little beastie. Unfortunately, not many options for Linux even though versions comprise both 3rd and 4th most common OS's. That would be quite a large market share for hardware. But, it's a Windows monopolized world...

I use this to transcribe. It is compatible with a MAC but does not work with free version of transcription software. Also I cannot seem to get it to reverse or fast forward bit that may be the fault of my software.

This is a pretty bad version of Pac-man. Very little in common with the arcade version. The sound is bad. The maze is different. The colors are wrong. Pac-Man only faces left or right (not up or down.)

Instead try Ms. Pac-man or Jr. Pac-man. They are closer to their arcade versions and much better than this cartridge.
Works great, we love it for lists on our fridge.
Works Fine. It is a ruler
Mic stopped working after awhile

I was a little disappointed with Super Monkey Ball. It has a main game, and 50 mini-games. The main game is quite fast paced and fun, however, it is a little too simplistic to justify the cost of a full game. Supposedly the 50 mini-games should make up for it. However, these mini-games are so difficult to control to be any fun. After playing Wii Sports, I just cannot get used to the awkward gaming experience Super Monkey Ball has to offer.
Beware... This does NOT fit a Photogenic PL 1250 strobe!
It's a really.cool idea. The color was a lil drastic.and.unhad to use it lightly, I wouldnt use for prom or a wedding but if used sparingly, not so bad
I use it for keeping my bill stubs together with their envelopes before paying them. they work better than the large black ones i have been using.
I took it out of the box, plugged it in and NOTHING. Nothing happened, nothing got stapled. Checked, rechecked and put it back in the box to return.

Not a big fan ...very thick and doesn’t dry quickly
However works along with other Naitiques products. Love Formula 1 and 2 – works well for my nails

It was a pack of ordinary sheet protector, no thinner, no thicker, but at a good price point. The company was easy to work with. I was given these product and was not asked for a five star review and I really appreciate how honest they were. I'd recommend this company to buy things from.
Followed directions, but found them stuck to other things after wash.

This game is fun and I haven't seen a guessing game done this way before. It's nice because you are working on two pictures at a time so if you are stuck on one you still have the other to work through. You've got letters to help you figure out the words and overall the game design and play is nice.

Suddenly it needed me to register to proceed ?
screw this. not gonna register to play a game for goodness sake.

remove/uninstall/burn
Weird to figure out, and use.

This is the 2nd one I bought. They do have good quality in day and night. Only complaint is the amount of false alarms with rain, a wheel barrow setting off the motion alarm and the phone alerting you every minute. The hicampro app is ok I guess once you figure it out. I hate that there's no way to delete the motion videos that it took. Regardless if you reformat the SD card or not. After having 2 cameras up for a while I have to say this brand has ALOT of false alarms. You play back the video and there's nothing there that should've tripped a motion alarm. Deduct 2 star for that.

I think this might be my favorite self tanner I've ever used! It's the kind of tanner where you have to put it on at night and you'll see the difference the next morning. The lotion is white and has a great scent (even afterwards). I only had to use it for 2 nights to get the shade I wanted and it looked very natural. I love this brand and this tanner is my go-to now for sure.
Did not come with power supply, required on original xboz 360 consoles. Original xbox 360 consoles does not have the orange usb port. Useless for now, until I get the power cord.

I gave this is product months of testing before deciding this was an absolute waste of my money. I wouldn't mind the time it takes to complete if it lastest more than a couple days. The product is thick and peels up easily then they just pull off after that.
I used it to back up 3 windows 10 computers. The installation is simple and does not take very much time.
The cloths barley have any product on them. It does an ok job at removing the makeup but it takes too many of them to do so.
The smell ruins it for the deodorant. It’s so offputting I can’t use it
White Echo came with a black cord and plug - why can't Amazon color coordinate their electronics!!!
I bought 2. The chair isn't good to sit in any length of time.

I bought these to share my hand sanitizer supply. They're pretty, and the cobalt shade helps keep ingredients from breaking down (blocks the bad part of the light spectrum).

However,

These are not very squeezy squeeze bottles.

In fact, if I had to say, I'd be obliged to tell you that they don't squeeze much at all.

More like drip bottles. And turn it upside down and pound the bottle bottles.

I am using this with a LyxPro 4-Channel pair of boxes connected via Ethercon. The quality of this cable is excellent, especially considering the lower price. It transmits noise-free too. And, finally, it is more flexible that I thought that it would be. If you are an old timer who remembers 10BASE2, this has about the same semi-flexible quality as that cable.

Unfortunately it will not transmit phantom power, and I suspect that is because one end of the ground is lifted. However, if you don't need phantom power this is a great value based on price, quietness and overall construction.
Fun game to play when your bored .

Came as described. Very sturdy and hard plastic. Slightly heavy but much better than a sturdy clipboard with the big ol massive clip.

One has been broken so far. Use for rounds in a hospital every 15 mins. It snapped after being smashed between a metal door (1in thick) and metal frame. Would expect it to break
Definitely not what I expected. Not lightweight at all once install looked so tacky had to remove immediately.
Son said it had a great fit. He had a hard time hearing with it on and got rid of it.
They took FOREVER to get here.....and the box is dated 2011....? But it is 2014 now...? They work and its a good deal...but out dated.

I like to spray this on my face off and on during the day. It moisturizers my face and it also refreshes my face. I am pleased with this product. Many days, I don't wear any makeup so a little squirt of the mist is refreshing
The app works okay but I only really downloaded it so I could set up an account to work with my Amazon Echo.

One of the TVs in a back bedroom always has difficulty streaming videos because the wireless signal is too weak. We installed this in the hallway near the bedroom and have not had any problems since. We had no issues at all with the setup.
We purchased these for our son to use for ps3 call of duty. They work however, the sound quality is lacking.
They seem to be as good as the ones I would get from stores or canon. No problems and they seem to last appropriately.
They do not fall off, but whatever it is made from irritates my skin on my ears.
The color and design are the reason this is 3 stars. If you put any cards in this it won't shut. The pleather is seriously cheap.

This blotter is a good size and looks very nice. I don't believe it is real leather though, despite it saying it is leather. That caused me to deduct one star, as I don't like companies trying to fool people.

I bought this for my RV, did not know I had to hardwire it for the parking monitor to work. Directions are not very clear and concise, and our typed out extremely small letters and numbers, very hard to read. Not very user friendly.

Box came damaged with wholes and messy tape somewhat holding box together. Must have been returned before. Not easy to assemble. One main part broke. The whole basket is flimsy are best. On first outing the big wheel came off. A nice man on the street helped me with a temp fix.

There are three 2.6 ounce solid tubes in this package. The deodorant glides on smooth and what I call "thick." It is moisturizing. Unfortunately, since this does not have aluminum (which I require), I stink after 4 hours with this. I originally thought this had aluminum and not 0% aluminum, which is why I ordered it. Unfortunately, this is two stars for me. I rated it three stars because I read the label wrong and know for a fact that no product w/o aluminum has ever worked for me.

At the current price of $17.97, this comes to an expensive $5.99 per tube.
ps 2 well its going to ps 3 revamped but the story is fast its mostly long beocuse of the required long fights while not movong closer to the end

A reasonably priced cable that I bought as a replacement for an Asus external USB monitor. The one thing I've noticed is flickering in the video vs. the original (Asus) cable. Going to try and get an Asus replacement cable to see if that resolves the flicker.

I used this tape to put small shelves up on my wall. They weren't even holding anything heavy, the tape started coming loose from the back of my shelves and everything fell on the floor and broke. As you can see it also ruined my wall above my larger shelf and I had to recycle it and now I have to repaint my wall. I was so upset I will never use this tape again. I threw away what I had left.

A worthy replacement to my Naga epic! It's smaller than the newer version of the nagas (thank goodness), as I am very particular about my grip style.

Anyway, software is better than the stupid synapse crap Razer wants you to use. It's worlds ahead of its competition in this regard. Additionally, this thing is actually a pleasure to use and better than the MMO 7 and the original RAT (I have both). It's lighter, better laser feel, and more options that matter to your normal gamer.
Terrible problems with buffering and freezing that I don't have with other streaming apps.

I found the downloading & installing instructions provided by amazon digital (or lack of) not to be very senior friendly. Next time I'm going to purchase from another download source. The AVG program needs a cleaning up -- to much scattered clutter -- it's got very big in size....
Very relaxing after a day of work. Recommend for sure☺
Poor picture quality, sound not very good!
honestly for $100 you are way better off spending an extra $50 just getting the GT Omega. this was flimsy and cumbersome. would not recommend

This kitty paw pencil case is cute! Pens and pencils fit nicely in it. I was able to get at least 10 pens in it without affecting the zipper. The zipper works well. There's a clip on it so you can attach it to your backpack.

I wanted to like this product so much, but it leaned back at an odd angle. Because of this, it also took up more room on the table than I wanted. This size seems to only come in the larger shelf thickness which leaves too much room for my goods (art prints).
